Fact Recall Metric.description: Measures the completeness of information retrieval in the generated email compared to key facts.
Fact Recall Metric.logic: Uses an LLM-as-a-Judge system to verify if each individual fact bullet point is semantically present in the generated email body. Score = (facts recalled / total facts), ranging from 0.0 to 1.0.

Tone Adherence Metric.description: Measures style and voice alignment with the requested tone.
Tone Adherence Metric.logic: Uses an LLM-as-a-Judge system to evaluate tone alignment (formal, casual, urgent, empathetic) on a 1-5 rubric. Score is normalized to a 0.0 to 1.0 scale.

Structure and Professionalism Metric.description: Measures structure correctness, layout flow, and professional greeting/sign-off while checking for extra conversation fluff.
Structure and Professionalism Metric.logic: Combines a programmatic search for standard greetings and sign-offs (40% weight) with an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation of layout quality and checks for conversational meta-talk (60% weight).

runs.generated_body:
Dear [Client Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on our meeting on Tuesday to discuss the Q3 marketing campaign project. As we agreed, I sent the proposal draft to you on Wednesday afternoon for your review.

To ensure we stay on schedule, I kindly request that you provide your feedback on the proposal by Friday at 5:00 PM local time. Your input is invaluable in helping us deliver a successful project.

Thank you for your time and consideration. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

[Your Name]

runs.intent: Apologize for a shipping delay on a customer order and offer compensation
runs.thinking: The tone is empathetic, so I'll start by acknowledging the customer's frustration and apologizing for the delay. I'll then explain the reason for the delay, provide the new expected delivery date, and offer a compensation in the form of a $15 credit towards their next purchase. I'll make sure to be polite and understanding throughout the email.
runs.subject: Apology for Shipping Delay - Order #10842
runs.generated_body:
Dear valued customer,

I want to start by apologizing for the delay in shipping your order, #10842. We understand how frustrating this must be for you, and we're truly sorry for the inconvenience.

Unfortunately, the severe winter weather in our Midwest logistics hub has caused significant disruptions to our shipping schedule. However, we're pleased to inform you that we're working hard to get your order back on track, and our new expected delivery date is now June 22nd.

As a gesture of goodwill, we'd like to offer you a $15 credit towards your next purchase. We hope this small token of apology will help make up for the delay and show our commitment to your satisfaction.

If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We're here to help and appreciate your patience and understanding.

Thank you for your business, and we look forward to getting your order to you soon.

Best regards,
[Name]
runs.reference_email:
Subject: Important update regarding your order #10842

Dear [Name],

I am writing to sincerely apologize for a delay in delivery for your order #10842.

Due to severe winter weather at our Midwest logistics hub, shipping routes have been temporarily disrupted, affecting your order's transit. We are doing everything we can to expedite this, and your new expected delivery date is now June 22. 

I know how frustrating shipping delays can be. To help make this right, we've applied a $15 credit to your account, which will automatically deduct from your next purchase. 

Thank you so much for your patience and understanding.

Warmly,
[Your Name]

runs.intent: Request a deadline extension for the quarterly financial report
runs.thinking: The tone is formal, so I will maintain a professional tone throughout the email. runs.subject: Request for Deadline Extension for Quarterly Financial Report
runs.generated_body:
Dear [Manager's Name],

I am writing to request a deadline extension for the quarterly financial report, which is currently due on Monday, June 22nd. Unfortunately, we have encountered a delay due to the late data release from the European division, which has impacted our ability to complete the report on time.

In light of this situation, I am requesting a new submission deadline of Thursday, June 25th. I am confident that with this additional time, we will be able to complete the report to the highest standards.

In the meantime, I can provide a partial draft of the completed sections by Monday, which will give you an opportunity to review our progress and provide feedback. Please let me know if this revised deadline is acceptable, and if there are any further discussions required.

Thank you for your understanding and support in this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
runs.reference_email:
Subject: Extension Request: Quarterly Financial Report

Dear [Name],

I am writing to formally request a brief extension for the submission of the quarterly financial report, which is currently scheduled for Monday, June 22nd.

Unfortunately, we have experienced an unexpected delay in receiving the final figures from our European division. As a result, we require additional time to integrate their data and ensure the report's accuracy. I would like to request a new submission deadline of Thursday, June 25th.

In the meantime, I can share a partial draft containing all other completed sections this Monday for your preliminary review. Thank you for your consideration and understanding.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

runs.generated_body:
Dear Sarah,

I wanted to personally reach out to you regarding the status of your application for the Senior QA Engineer position. I want to start by saying how impressed we were with your technical skills and background. Your experience and qualifications truly stood out throughout the hiring process.

Unfortunately, after careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with another candidate who brings more extensive experience in test automation frameworks. Please know that this decision was not made lightly, and we were genuinely impressed by your abilities.

I want to thank you for taking the time to interview with us and for sharing your qualifications with our team. We appreciate your interest in our company and wish you the best of luck in your job search.

Best regards,
[Name]

This was an incredibly difficult decision for the team. We were deeply impressed by your technical skills and your excellent QA background. However, we have decided to move forward with another candidate whose experience aligns more closely with the specific test automation frameworks we are building out.

We appreciate the enthusiasm and expertise you shared with us. We would love to stay in touch and keep you in mind for future roles that fit your background.

Wishing you all the best in your search.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

A critical database server maintenance window is scheduled for Saturday, June 20, 2026, from 2:00 AM to 5:00 AM EST. During this time, we expect up to 30 minutes of complete offline service disruption.

To minimize the impact, please ensure that all active sessions and transactions are saved before 1:45 AM EST. This will help prevent any data loss or corruption.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding in this matter. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
[Name]

The maintenance window is scheduled from 2:00 AM to 5:00 AM EST. During this period, the system will experience a complete service disruption and will be fully offline for up to 30 minutes.

To prevent any potential data loss, you must save all active sessions and finalize database transactions prior to 1:45 AM EST on Saturday. We appreciate your immediate attention to this notice and apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

runs.intent: Request a contract discount from a SaaS platform vendor during renewal negotiations
runs.thinking: The tone is formal, so I will address the vendor directly, mention our 3-year partnership, highlight the license expansion, and clearly state the requested discount. I will also reference the upcoming contract renewal to emphasize the importance of the discount.
runs.subject: Contract Renewal Negotiation - Request for Volume Discount
runs.generated_body:
Dear [Vendor Representative],

I hope this email finds you well. As we approach our annual contract renewal next month, I would like to discuss the possibility of a volume discount on our expanded license count.

As you are aware, our company has been a valued customer of your SaaS platform for the past three years, and we are pleased to be expanding our license count from 50 seats to 150 seats. Given our long-standing partnership and the significant increase in our license requirements, we believe that a 15% volume discount on the expanded seat license cost is reasonable and in line with industry standards.

We would appreciate it if you could consider this request and provide a revised quote reflecting the discount. If there are any concerns or additional information required from our end, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your attention to this matter, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
runs.reference_email:
Subject: Contract Renewal Negotiations & License Expansion Inquiry

Dear [Name],

As our annual contract renewal approaches next month, I would like to discuss our account terms. We have been very pleased with our 3-year partnership with your SaaS platform.

Due to our team's growth, we are planning to significantly expand our utilization from the current 50 seats to 150 seats at this renewal. Given this threefold increase in our commitment, we would like to request a 15% volume discount on the expanded seat license pricing.

I look forward to discussing how we can finalize this contract renewal. Please let me know when you are available for a brief call to discuss.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

runs.subject: Our Apology – Shipping Delay for Order #10842
runs.generated_body:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m writing to sincerely apologize for the delay in delivering your order #10842. Unfortunately, severe winter weather at our Midwest logistics hub disrupted our shipping schedule, and we understand how frustrating this can be.

We now expect your package to arrive on June 22nd. To make up for the inconvenience, we’d like to offer you a $15 credit toward your next purchase with us. The credit will be automatically applied to your account and can be used at any time.

Thank you for your patience and understanding. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
Customer Experience Team

Dear [Name],

I know how frustrating shipping delays can be. To help make this right, we've applied a $15 credit to your account, which will automatically deduct from your next purchase. 

Thank you so much for your patience and understanding.

Warmly,

runs.subject: Request for Extension of Quarterly Financial Report Deadline
runs.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient’s Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request an extension for the submission of the quarterly financial report, which is currently due on Monday, June 22nd.

Unfortunately, we have experienced a delay in receiving the necessary data from our European division. This late data release has impacted our ability to complete the report by the original deadline.

In light of this, I respectfully request that the new submission deadline be moved to Thursday, June 25th. To keep the process transparent, I can provide a partial draft of the sections that have been completed by Monday, June 22nd.

Thank you for your understanding and consideration of this request. Please let me know if you require any additional information.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

runs.subject: URGENT: Critical Database Server Maintenance – Service Impact Expected June 20
runs.generated_body:
Hi All,

Please be advised of an upcoming critical maintenance window for our core database server. The maintenance is scheduled for **Saturday, June 20, 2026, from 2:00 AM to 5:00 AM EST**.

During this window we anticipate **up to 30 minutes of complete offline service disruption**. To minimize impact, **all active sessions and transactions must be saved no later than 1:45 AM EST**.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and apologize for any inconvenience caused. Please acknowledge receipt of this notice and let us know if you have any concerns.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
runs.reference_email:
Subject: CRITICAL NOTICE: Database Server Maintenance & Outage Window - June 20

Dear Stakeholders,

Please be advised that we will be conducting critical server maintenance on our core database this coming Saturday, June 20, 2026.

The maintenance window is scheduled from 2:00 AM to 5:00 AM EST. During this period, the system will experience a complete service disruption and will be fully offline for up to 30 minutes.

To prevent any potential data loss, you must save all active sessions and finalize database transactions prior to 1:45 AM EST on Saturday. We appreciate your immediate attention to this notice and apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

runs.subject: Request for Volume Discount on Upcoming Renewal
runs.generated_body:
Dear [Vendor Account Manager],

I hope you are well. I am writing on behalf of [Your Company] regarding our annual renewal of the SaaS platform contract, which is scheduled for next month.

As you know, we have been a satisfied customer for the past three years. In preparation for the upcoming renewal, we plan to expand our license count from the current 50 seats to 150 seats to support our growing team.

Given this substantial increase in volume, we would like to request a 15% discount on the license fees for the expanded seat count. We believe this adjustment reflects the long‑term partnership we have built and will enable us to continue leveraging your platform effectively.

Could you please confirm whether this discount can be applied to our renewal agreement? We appreciate your consideration and look forward to your response.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company]
[Contact Information]

I look forward to discussing how we can finalize this contract renewal. Please let me know when you are available for a brief call to discuss.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
